name: Nuts About Cheese
recipeInstructions:
Any flavored cream cheese (pepper or orange) can be used instead of the mixture of Stilton, cream cheese, mayo and worcestershire sauce. To add variety, serve a couple of flavor combinations, such as Stilton and garlic-herb cheese.
Toast nuts on baking sheet in 350°F oven for 8-10 minutes or until fragrant. Let cool completely. In food processor or by hand, combine cream cheese, stilton, mayonnaise and worcestershire sauce until blended. Refrigerate until firm. Sandwich about 1/2 tsp cheese mixture between 2 nut halves. Refrigerate until serving.
